title: Fusion LCOE vs. Solar, Wind, and Fission (2030–2050)
executive_question: How does fusion LCOE compare to solar, wind, and fission in 2030, 2040, and 2050?
comparison_set: Fusion vs. solar PV, onshore wind, nuclear fission
preferred_sources: Lazard Levelized Cost of Energy Analysis
search_queries: IEA World Energy Outlook 2024 LCOE solar wind nuclear
IRENA renewable power generation costs 2024 LCOE
Lazard levelized cost of energy 2024 fusion estimate
data_quality_rule: Use official or widely cited estimates; note if fusion LCOE is from developer projections or independent studies.

title: Fusion Startup Funding and Milestone Timeline
executive_question: Which fusion companies have the most funding and what are their milestones?
comparison_set: Private fusion companies (e.g., Commonwealth Fusion Systems, Helion Energy, TAE Technologies, General Fusion, Zap Energy)
search_queries: Helion Energy commercial plant target date
data_quality_rule: Cross-reference funding data from at least two sources; milestone dates from official company announcements.

title: Projected Market Size for Fusion by Application (2050)
executive_question: What is the projected market size for fusion in electricity, industrial heat, and hydrogen by 2050?
required_metrics: Market value ($B/year) in 2050 – low, base, high scenarios
search_queries: industrial heat market size 2050 Grand View Research
data_quality_rule: Use publicly available market reports; note if fusion share is assumed.

title: Tritium Supply vs. Fusion Reactor Demand
executive_question: How does tritium supply constrain fusion deployment?
required_metrics: Tritium supply (kg/year) – from CANDU reactors, other sources
Tritium demand per reactor (kg/year) – for 500 MW fusion plant
preferred_sources: Fusion engineering papers (e.g., Abdou et al.)
search_queries: tritium consumption per fusion reactor kg/year
data_quality_rule: Use IAEA or peer-reviewed data; if supply data is classified, note as uncertain.

title: Regulatory Timeline for Fusion Licensing by Country
executive_question: What is the regulatory timeline for fusion licensing in key countries?
required_metrics: Regulatory milestone: Proposed rule, public comment, final rule, first license issuance
preferred_sources: U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission (NRC) – fusion regulatory framework
search_queries: NRC fusion regulatory framework proposed rule 2024
data_quality_rule: Use official regulatory publications; if timeline is not public, note as TBD.

title: Fusion LCOE Projections with Uncertainty Bands (2030–2050)
executive_question: What is the expected range of fusion LCOE over time?
required_metrics: Fusion LCOE ($/MWh) – low, median, high estimates
comparison_set: Multiple fusion LCOE estimates from different sources
search_queries: fusion levelized cost of energy range 2040
data_quality_rule: Include only estimates from published reports; note if estimates are from developers or independent analysts.

title: Fusion Project Pipeline: Capacity and Status
executive_question: What is the planned capacity and status of major fusion projects?
comparison_set: Major fusion projects (ITER, SPARC, CFETR, DEMO, private projects)
data_quality_rule: Use official project updates; if capacity is not final, note as planned.
